name: triage filter accepts a PR with iterative pushes after review (signal that author responded to review feedback)
command: printf '{"number":3,"merged":true,"author_type":"User","docs_only":false,"substantive_comments":2,"reviewer_requested_changes":false,"iterative_pushes":2}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr pr.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=accept' out.txt && grep -q 'signals=.*iterative-pushes' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
